description: Carmen celebrates the parenting wins that only other parents understand

small_independence: <break time="350ms"/>They did it themselves? <break time="300ms"/>That's independence growing right there.
<break time="400ms"/>One less thing you have to do for them. <break time="350ms"/>That's progress.
<break time="350ms"/>Self-sufficiency! <break time="300ms"/>We love to see it.
ate_something_new: <break time="350ms"/>They ate it? <break time="300ms"/>Without a fight? <break time="250ms"/>That's a win!
<break time="400ms"/>A new food! <break time="350ms"/>Mark the calendar!
<break time="350ms"/>One more thing they'll eat. <break time="300ms"/>The food list grows.
slept_well: <break time="400ms"/>A full night? <break time="350ms"/>How do you feel? <break time="300ms"/>Human again?
<break time="400ms"/>That's huge. <break time="350ms"/>Rested parent equals better parent. <break time="300ms"/>It's math.

kept_your_cool: <break time="350ms"/>You didn't yell? <break time="300ms"/>In that situation? <break time="250ms"/>That's incredible restraint.
<break time="400ms"/>Staying calm when they're pushing every button? <break time="350ms"/>That's superhuman.
<break time="350ms"/>The fact that you held it together <break time="300ms"/>is genuinely impressive.
asked_for_help: <break time="400ms"/>You asked for help! <break time="350ms"/>That's not weakness. <break time="300ms"/>That's wisdom.
<break time="350ms"/>Good. <break time="300ms"/>You're not supposed to do this alone.
<break time="400ms"/>Asking for help is one of the hardest parts. <break time="350ms"/>And you did it.
took_time_for_yourself: <break time="350ms"/>You took time for yourself? <break time="300ms"/>Without guilt? <break time="250ms"/>We're celebrating that.
<break time="400ms"/>Self-care isn't selfish. <break time="350ms"/>It's survival. <break time="300ms"/>Good for you.
<break time="350ms"/>A parent who takes care of themselves <break time="300ms"/>is a better parent. <break time="250ms"/>Period.
set_a_boundary: <break time="400ms"/>You said no! <break time="350ms"/>To something you didn't want to do! <break time="300ms"/>That's growth.
<break time="350ms"/>Boundaries are hard to set. <break time="300ms"/>Especially with family. <break time="250ms"/>I'm proud of you.
<break time="400ms"/>Protecting your energy protects your family. <break time="350ms"/>That boundary matters.

everyone_alive: <break time="350ms"/>Everyone's alive? <break time="300ms"/>Fed? <break time="250ms"/>That's a successful day.
<break time="400ms"/>The bar for success today is survival. <break time="350ms"/>And you hit it.
<break time="350ms"/>Some days the win is just <break time="300ms"/>getting through. <break time="250ms"/>Today was one of those.
survived_tantrum: <break time="400ms"/>You made it through that meltdown. <break time="350ms"/>In public, no less. <break time="300ms"/>Warrior status.
<break time="350ms"/>Tantrums in public are the worst. <break time="300ms"/>And you survived.
<break time="400ms"/>The tantrum ended. <break time="350ms"/>You're still standing. <break time="300ms"/>That's a win.
made_it_to_bedtime: <break time="350ms"/>You made it to bedtime! <break time="300ms"/>The finish line! <break time="250ms"/>The blessed quiet!
<break time="400ms"/>They're in bed. <break time="350ms"/>You're off duty. <break time="300ms"/>Breathe.
<break time="350ms"/>The day is done. <break time="300ms"/>Whatever happened - <break time="250ms"/>you got through it.
